meta.title: #BeADeepLearner like Tim Steves with DeepLearning.AI
meta.description:
“I took the Deep Learning Specialization after retiring from a 40-year career as an engineer and chief scientist. Thanks to the courses, I programmed an algorithm for a self-driving car, trained a system to recognize American Sign Language, and even got a neural network to paint a picture of my wife, Patti. Earlier this year, I woke up with an idea about how deep learning could make the world a better place and filed a patent application to turn my idea into reality.” 

Looking to grow your skills and build a career in AI? Join 1 million+ learners and #BeADeepLearner with the Deep Learning Specialization, a foundational online program by machine learning pioneer Andrew Ng. Read how learners like Tim and others took the next step in their AI journey: https://www.deeplearning.ai/program/deep-learning-specialization/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=dls-jan21&course_id=dls-2
